game_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Super Special Attack
special_mechanics.description: Filling a green meter under the life bar by hitting opponents allows execution of super special attack by pressing both strong attack buttons simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Game Speed Enhancement
special_mechanics.description: Optional speed enhancement available that increases fight intensity and difficulty

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source document is Wikipedia general overview with no specific movement physics, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system documentation. Genesis version lacks detailed technical specifications in available sources.
